rows.description: Computus Ger. Paynter Rec. foris a secundo die
rows.notes: Directly read from image. The initial header text spans two physical lines. `gemini-flash` was close on description, but `gpt-5-mini` combined this line with the next.
Directly read from image, completing the first logical header. `gemini-flash`'s description was an exact match. `gpt-5-mini` combined this line with the previous.
Consensus on header type and no amounts. `gemini-flash`'s description 'remanentiis' is visually more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s 'remanentib?'.

Consensus on description, amounts, and fraction. Pound notation '-AA' is a visual mark, not a numerical value, and is represented by an empty string per output format. Pence '1d' interpreted as 1 pence and 0.5 fraction per page guidance.
Consensus on row type and no amounts. `gemini-flash`'s description 'Arreragiis' is an exact visual match over `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Arrearagijs'.

Description 'Guineas & anno' taken from `gemini-flash`. Monetary values (60 pounds, 0 shillings, 0 pence) taken from `gpt-5-mini` based on clear visual alignment of '60' under the pounds column and '00' under shillings and pence, consistent with the total line.

Description 'Longwitnam & anno' and pence fraction (0.5 for 'd') taken from `gemini-flash`. Monetary values (59 pounds, 19 shillings, 9 pence) based on visual verification supporting `gpt-5-mini` for pounds/shillings.
Description 'min hennet in pt' taken from `gemini-flash`. Monetary values (20 pounds, 0 shillings, 0 pence) taken from `gpt-5-mini` based on clear visual alignment of '20' under the pounds column.

Description 'Southnewington – & anno' taken from `gemini-flash`. Monetary values (58 pounds, 0 shillings, 0 pence) taken from `gpt-5-mini` based on clear visual alignment of '58' under the pounds column.

Description 'Cudlington Rry pro mich' taken from `gemini-flash`. Monetary values (10 pounds, 0 shillings, 0 pence) taken from `gpt-5-mini` based on clear visual alignment of '10' under the pounds column.

Description 'Merton Rry & mich.' taken from `gemini-flash`. Monetary values (3 pounds, 8 shillings, 8 pence) taken from `gpt-5-mini` based on clear visual alignment of '03 08 08' in respective columns.
Description 'Chacehill & sesquianno' taken from `gemini-flash`. Visual verification confirms no monetary amounts are present for this row, supporting `gpt-5-mini`.
Consensus on description and no amounts. `gpt-5-mini`'s `row_type` of 'header' is more appropriate for this descriptive sub-label.
Consensus on description and no amounts. `gemini-flash`'s `row_type` of 'entry' is more appropriate for this descriptive item.
Consensus on description, amounts, and fraction. Clear reading from image.

Description 'Culcott pro anno' taken from `gemini-flash`. Consensus on monetary values. The 'b' after pence is not a standard fraction and is not extracted as one, per hard rule filter (supporting `gemini-flash`).

Consensus on monetary values and fraction. Description 'Cudlington mills & mich' taken from `gemini-flash` as it is an exact visual match. '3d' correctly interpreted as 3 pence and 0.5 fraction per page guidance.

Consensus on description, shillings, and pence. Pounds value is '8' after visual verification, as suggested by `gpt-5-mini`. The character after pence is a 'b', not a standard fraction, so no fraction is extracted (supporting `gemini-flash`).

Consensus on row type and no amounts. Description 'Mountague & quinguienio et Dinied.' taken from `gemini-flash` as it is an exact visual match. `gpt-5-mini`'s '4 quinquiennio et dimid' is less accurate.
Consensus on description, row type, and no amounts.
Consensus on row type and no amounts. Description 'Greeneway & Triennio' taken from `gemini-flash` as it is an exact visual match.
Consensus on description, row type, and no amounts.
Consensus on description, amounts, and fraction. Clear reading from image.
Consensus on description, amounts, and fraction. Clear reading from image.
Consensus on description, row type, and no amounts.
Consensus on description and monetary values. `gemini-flash` correctly identified the 'q' character as a 0.25 (farthing) fraction as per page guidance. `gpt-5-mini` missed the fraction.
Consensus on row type and no amounts. Description 'Tintinhull {' taken from `gpt-5-mini` as it visually includes the brace indicating grouping. `gemini-flash` missed the brace.

Consensus on description, pounds, and shillings. Pence value is '11' and fraction is 0.25 ('q'), taken from `gemini-flash` based on clear visual reading. `gpt-5-mini` misread pence as '10' and missed the fraction.
Consensus on description, amounts, and fraction. Clear reading from image. 'q' correctly interpreted as 0.25 fraction per page guidance.
Consensus on monetary values and fraction. Description 'Clifton Ferry & anno' taken from `gemini-flash` as it is an exact visual match; `gpt-5-mini` misread 'Clifton' as 'Llifton'.

Consensus on monetary values. Description 'Bensington & triennio' and correct fraction (0.25 for 'q') taken from `gemini-flash` based on clear visual reading and page guidance. `gpt-5-mini` misread 'Bensington' as 'Densington' and missed the fraction.
Consensus on monetary values and fraction. Description 'Brew house & anno' taken from `gemini-flash` as it is an exact visual match; `gpt-5-mini` misread the description.
Consensus on row type and no amounts. Description 'South newton Jenem & anno' taken from `gemini-flash` as it is an exact visual match.
Consensus on row type and no amounts. Description 'Trethewin & sesqui anno' taken from `gemini-flash` as it is an exact visual match.

Description 'merton Vicarge & quadriennio' taken from `gemini-flash`. Visual verification confirms no monetary amounts are present for this row, supporting `gpt-5-mini`. `gemini-flash` incorrectly hallucinated amounts.
Consensus on description, shillings, and pence. Pounds value is '4', visually verified from the image, supporting `gpt-5-mini`. `gemini-flash` incorrectly read pounds as '5'.
Description and monetary values taken from `gpt-5-mini`. The row is visually struck-through, but the values 5 pounds, 0 shillings, 0 pence are legible. `gemini-flash`'s amounts were incorrect.

Description 'Jure exstrentis & anno' taken from `gemini-flash`. Monetary values (5 pounds, 7 shillings, 2 pence) taken from `gpt-5-mini` based on visual verification. The row is visually struck-through. `gemini-flash`'s amounts were incorrect.

Description taken from consensus. Monetary values (0 pounds, 8 shillings, 0 pence) are visually verified from the image. `gemini-flash` incorrectly reported no amounts. `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly read pence as '2' instead of '0'.
Visually observed horizontal rule acting as a separator before the final total. Included based on `gpt-5-mini`. `gemini-flash` missed this row.
Consensus on amounts and row type. Description is empty as per visual verification, supporting `gemini-flash` (who provided an empty description) over `gpt-5-mini` (who put numbers in description).
